author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Expose the v2 system as a stable CLI with command-level workflows for recommend, validate, compare, explain, build-packet, and benchmark.
research_question: What CLI surface is required so operators can use BDC CLI v2 end-to-end without custom internal scripts?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after TASK-7510 is SUCCESS.

tests_required: command-level integration tests for recommend, validate, compare, explain, build-packet, and benchmark
compare mode shows memo vs v1 vs v2 when artifacts are provided
definition_of_done: usage docs and example packets added
